'''fazhulu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycocellulose|mycocellulose]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-zh-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycocellulose|mycocellulose]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| fazhulu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæzhilith|fæzhilith]] || [[word:fæzhilij|fæzhilij]] || [[word:fæzhilish|fæzhilish]] || [[word:fæzhili|fæzhili]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fazhuzhuluth|fazhuzhuluth]] || [[word:fazhuzhuluj|fazhuzhuluj]] || [[word:fazhuzhulush|fazhuzhulush]] || [[word:fazhuzhulu|fazhuzhulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fazhuluth|fazhuluth]] || [[word:fazhuluj|fazhuluj]] || [[word:fazhulush|fazhulush]] || [[word:fazhulu|fazhulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fazhufluth|fazhufluth]] || [[word:fazhufluj|fazhufluj]] || [[word:fazhuflush|fazhuflush]] || [[word:fazhufluf|fazhufluf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fazhuluthu|fazhuluthu]] || [[word:fazhuluju|fazhuluju]] || [[word:fazhulushu|fazhulushu]] || [[word:fazhuluku|fazhuluku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fazhuluth|fazhuluth]] || [[word:fazhuluj|fazhuluj]] || [[word:fazhulush|fazhulush]] || [[word:fazhulu|fazhulu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fazhuluthul|fazhuluthul]] || [[word:fazhulujul|fazhulujul]] || [[word:fazhulushul|fazhulushul]] || [[word:fazhulukul|fazhulukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fazhuluthuthu|fazhuluthuthu]] || [[word:fazhulujuju|fazhulujuju]] || [[word:fazhulushushu|fazhulushushu]] || [[word:fazhuluku|fazhuluku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fazhuluthun|fazhuluthun]] || [[word:fazhulujun|fazhulujun]] || [[word:fazhulushun|fazhulushun]] || [[word:fazhulukun|fazhulukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fazhuluthuoro|fazhuluthuoro]] || [[word:fazhulujuoro|fazhulujuoro]] || [[word:fazhulushuoro|fazhulushuoro]] || [[word:fazhulukuoro|fazhulukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
